plugin.name: Settings
plugin.description: Application settings for appearance, automation, shortcuts, and plugin management.
title: Settings
description: Control appearance, language, startup behavior, tray behavior, shortcuts, and plugin management from one place.
output.label: Default output folder
output.note: Tools export into this folder by default.
theme.label: Theme
language.label: Language
scaling.label: UI scaling
appearance.note: Theme and language changes apply immediately.
startup.enabled: Autostart is enabled for this user profile.
shortcuts.note: Application shortcuts are always available while the app is focused. Global shortcuts are optional and may depend on desktop permissions.
shortcuts.status.available: Global shortcut registration is available in this session.
shortcuts.status.unavailable: Global shortcuts are unavailable in this session.
shortcuts.status.helper_active: The privileged hotkey helper is active for this session. Global shortcuts will be routed through the helper process.
shortcuts.status.helper_available: Global shortcuts are currently unavailable. {reason} Start the hotkey helper if you want global capture without elevating the main app.
shortcuts.helper_failed.title: Helper unavailable
shortcuts.helper_started.title: Helper started
shortcuts.helper_started.body: The hotkey helper is now active for this session.
plugins.note: Manage built-in and custom plugins here. Import standalone plugin files, plugin folders, or backup archives. Export selected plugins or the full set into a reusable backup zip.
plugins.name: Plugin
plugins.import_failed.title: Import failed
plugins.imported.title: Plugin imported
plugins.export_failed.title: Export failed
plugins.export_failed.body: Select at least one plugin to export.
plugins.exported.title: Plugins exported
plugins.applied.title: Plugin settings updated
plugins.applied.body: Plugin visibility and enabled state were updated.
saved.title: Settings saved
